plan_steps.action: Identify the current repository by reading root-level files (e.g., package.json, README, .git/config) to determine repo name, language, and purpose.
Enumerate the full directory tree and catalogue source files, config files, and assets. Identify entry points, key modules, and folder structure.
Inspect git log (recent commits), active branch, and any open/uncommitted changes (git status + git diff --stat) to capture repo state.
Analyse the file tree and repo metadata to produce a high-level architectural overview: layers, component relationships, and dependency graph.
Locate existing test files and frameworks, assess test coverage status, and flag untested modules or missing test infrastructure.
Consolidate all gathered information into a concise repo checkout summary report covering purpose, structure, git state, architecture, and test posture.
